    <title>Elevated errors on Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 3</var>, <var data-var='time'>22:06</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This incident has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 3</var>, <var data-var='time'>22:00</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 3</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:55</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 3</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:54</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
